message:
feat(rch): add dry-run support for cancel command and improve CLI tests

Cancel Command Dry-Run Support:
- Add --dry-run / -n flag to cancel command for previewing cancellations
- Integrate dry_run flag into CLI argument parsing tests
- Enable users to see what would be cancelled without actually cancelling

CLI Test Improvements:
- Simplify cancel command tests using struct pattern matching with `..`
- Add dedicated tests for --dry-run flag parsing
- Add test for -n short form of dry-run
- Add test for combining dry-run with build ID
- Reduce test verbosity while maintaining coverage by using pattern matching
  to focus on the specific fields being tested

The dry-run feature provides a safety net for users who want to verify
their cancel operations before executing them, particularly important
when cancelling all builds with --all flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
